headline: Analysts Boost American Tower (AMT) Price Target After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Results
summary: American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. Based on a report by TheFly in April, Raymond James raised its price target on American Tower to $240 from $229 while maintaining a Strong Buy rating on the shares, as the company’s first-quarter results beat expectations. Similarly, […]

headline: American Tower Suffers Mixed Optics, Despite Robust 5G/Data Center Fundamentals
summary: American Tower (AMT) outlook: 5G/AI spending, +18.4% data center growth, raised FY26 guidance, discounted 18x P/FFO, +53% upside.
